title: Timely Rewards
description: Give all players on a server customized rewards.
body:
![Timely Rewards Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Timely_Rewards/BH_TR_header.webp)
![Timely Rewards About](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Timely_Rewards/BH_TR_about.webp)
Timely Rewards allows server owners to set custom rewards that
are given to all players at specific intervals.
Rewards can be paused and toggled at any time with a single command. 
Customize up to 3 items, amounts, and duration. Modded items supported!

**Check the config file for the mod settings.**

![Timely Rewards Commands](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Timely_Rewards/BH_TR_commands.webp)
**Commands:**

/timelyrewards list
/timelyrewards toggle
/timelyrewards reload

**Mod must be installed on BOTH the server and the client.**

![Timely Rewards Bisect Hosting Promo Code](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Timely_Rewards/BH_TR_promo.webp)
[https://www.bisecthosting.com/selector](https://www.bisecthosting.com/selector)
